ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Unique Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state's id */,
  "area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("c_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economics" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "total_spending" REAL /* Total spending in the county */,
  "per_capita_spending" REAL /* Per capita spending in the county */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the county */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economics_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county's residents */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Median household income in the county */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "ind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient for the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "high_school_grad_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate in the county */,
  "college_grad_rate" REAL /* College graduation rate in the county */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio in the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in the county */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate in the county */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Smoking rate in the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "trans_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "average_commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time in the county */,
  "public_transit_usage" REAL /* Percentage of public transit usage in the county */,
  "bikeability_score" REAL /* Bikeability score of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trans_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the county */,
  "homeownership_rate" REAL /* Homeownership rate in the county */,
  "renter_occupied_rate" REAL /* Renter-occupied rate in the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index for the county */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of green space in the county */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index for the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_safety" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public safety data entry */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the county */,
  "fire_department_response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the fire department */,
  "emergency_response_time" REAL /* Average emergency response time in the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_safety_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, public user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., economic, demographic) */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_planning" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "c_fips" INTEGER /* Reference to the county's FIPS code */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_planning_c_fips FOREIGN KEY ("c_fips") REFERENCES counties ("c_fips")
)
